title: Exer - AI Motion Analysis
problem: Physical therapy assessment and monitoring requires in-person visits, limiting access and continuity of care.
solution: AI-powered motion analysis using smartphone cameras for orthopedic and physical therapy assessment and exercise tracking.
technology: Computer vision, pose estimation, AI movement analysis, mobile app
ai_type: Computer vision for pose estimation and movement analysis
traction_signals: Growing PT and orthopedic customer base
regulatory_notes: No FDA clearance needed for fitness/wellness
varden_fit: Moderate - Assessment tool enabling remote orthopedic and PT care. No hardware required.
notes: Software-only motion analysis. Good for remote PT assessment.
